violations.text: ROP seafood was observed with the package still in tact. Product was still partially frozen. Product was removed from package. ROP guidance document provided to PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Unit to be turned off and properly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
